template.name: ANSI A92.2 (2021) Dielectric Test - Category A/B

questions.prompt: Upper-end conductive material bonded per procedure.
If non-conductive platform (Category A): metal liner installed and bonded prior to test.
Vacuum limiting system visually inspected and function verified per manufacturer manual.
Lower test electrode system complete and continuity confirmed (intact).
Hydraulic lines crossing insulating boom section/system filled with oil by operating unit prior to test.
If continuity across joints cannot be ensured: shunting installed per procedure.
If chassis insulating system equipped: chassis insulating system shunted per procedure.
Current meter receptacle connected through shielded cable to current meter (when used) and then to ground.
Boom positioned per manufacturer/procedure for test configuration.
Test method selected and performed (AC Table 2 / DC Table 2 / Quarterly before-use line test Table 3 / Energized AC line contact Table 3).
